---
title: "Lecture Slides"
subtitle: "Core concepts, fundamentals, and theoretical foundations"
author: "[Dr Clemens Jarnach](https://clemensjarnach.github.io)"
affiliation: "Oxford Martin School, University of Oxford"
date: "03-18-2026"
resources:
  - files/2026_03_18_jarnach_social_network_analysis_workshop_slides.pdf

format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    code-fold: false
    theme: cosmo
    self-contained: false
  beamer:
    theme: Madrid
    colortheme: default
    fonttheme: structurebold
    aspectratio: 169
    slide-level: 2
    keep-tex: false
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
<iframe src="files/2026_03_18_jarnach_social_network_analysis_workshop_slides.pdf" width="100%" height="600px"></iframe>
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="beamer"}
\begin{center}
  \href{run:files/2026_03_18_jarnach_social_network_analysis_workshop_slides.pdf}%
    {\textbf{Open slides (PDF)}}
\end{center}
:::
